title: I used to think all EAs were junk, but automation is starting to win me over
author: morriase
selftext:
I've been a manual trader for years and always looked down on "plug and play" bots. But after blowing a few too many accounts on "gut feelings," I started testing one of my own on Gold. What I like about this setup (captured in the video) is the risk management. It handled a $600+ runner on XAUUSD with a tight trailing SL that I usually wouldn't have the discipline to hold. Still a work in progress though, but so far so good.

https://reddit.com/link/1rg7am3/video/pci2qw9jl1mg1/player

It’s not a "get rich quick" button and you still need to understand market conditions, but as a tool to handle the execution? It’s been a massive shift in my daily routine.

Curious if anyone else here has moved away from manual execution on Gold?
